overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing a character walking through an industrial space station or facility interior. The character moves through corridors with exposed piping, metal shelving, and industrial lighting, passing several NPCs. The environment features a utilitarian aesthetic with concrete floors and cool artificial lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial lounge area toward the corridor exit

notable_agents.action: sitting on a metal bench near a table
two individuals standing and conversing near the wall

entered.detail: low wooden table with items on top in the center of the room
simple metal seating bench against the right wall
tall industrial metal shelves with boxes and equipment
illuminated sign indicating Bay 04 above a doorway
exposed industrial piping and electrical conduits running along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an industrial common area with metal benches and a central wooden table. Two NPCs stand conversing on the left while another sits on a bench to the right. The environment features exposed ceiling pipes, metal shelving with equipment, and a sign for Bay 04 visible in the distance.

events.description: exits the lounge area and enters the main equipment corridor with visible elevator signage

agents.ego_description: proceeding down the corridor toward a figure standing in the distance

notable_agents.action: person in green jumpsuit standing stationary in the middle of the corridor

entered.detail: wall-mounted directional sign pointing toward the elevator
tall racks holding industrial equipment and containers
large dark screen mounted on the left wall
thick black cables running across the concrete floor

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the lounge into a long industrial corridor lined with equipment racks and overhead pipes. Thick cables run across the floor. An NPC in a green jumpsuit stands stationary in the distance as the character approaches. The elevator sign becomes visible on the left wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial bay entrance with heavy machinery

events.description: character passes the stationary NPC in green jumpsuit on the right side

agents.ego_description: passing the NPC in green and approaching the large industrial doorway ahead

notable_agents.action: person in green jumpsuit standing still as the character passes by

entered.detail: massive metal doorway with vertical panels leading to the next area
large orange mechanical doors or equipment housing with metal frames
row of simple metal seating against the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes the stationary NPC in green, who stands aside in the corridor. Ahead looms a large industrial gate with orange mechanical structures visible to the left. Metal benches line the right wall as the character continues toward the heavy doorway at the end of the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a utilitarian industrial facility that transitions from a communal lounge into a narrow service corridor. It begins in a common area featuring metal benches and a central wooden table, where NPCs converse beneath exposed ceiling pipes and equipment shelving. As the character moves forward, the space shifts into a long industrial corridor lined with equipment racks and thick cables running across the floor. The camera then approaches a stationary NPC in a green jumpsuit, passing them as an elevator sign appears on the left wall. Finally, the scene opens up toward a large industrial gate with orange mechanical structures and metal benches, leading the character toward a heavy doorway at the end of the hall.
